content.json:
# 🔍 SOC Incident Investigation Helper
---
Parameter-driven investigation workbook. Enter a user UPN or device name to get a unified cross-table timeline of all activity for that entity. Designed for incident response — one workbook, one entity, full picture.

> **How to use:** Enter a **User UPN** to investigate user-centric activity (sign-ins, alerts, Office 365, audit logs). Enter a **Device Name** to investigate device-centric activity (process execution, network connections, logons). Enter both to correlate user and device activity together.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where (isempty('{UserUPN}') or tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains tolower('{UserUPN}') or tolower(Entities) contains tolower('{UserUPN}'))
    or (isempty('{DeviceName}') or tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains tolower('{DeviceName}') or tolower(Entities) contains tolower('{DeviceName}'))
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}') or isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, ProductName, Tactics, Description
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Security alerts involving this entity

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| where tolower(UserPrincipalName) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, IPAddress, Location, ResultType, ResultDescription, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ClientAppUsed, ConditionalAccessStatus
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Sign-in logs for user

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend TargetUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))[0].userPrincipalName)
| where tolower(InitiatedByUPN) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
    or tolower(TargetUPN) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedByUPN, TargetUPN, Result, LoggedByService
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Entra audit events — initiated by or targeting this user

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| where tolower(UserId) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| summarize EventCount = count() by Operation, OfficeWorkload
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Office 365 activity summary for user

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}') or isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where (isnotempty('{UserUPN}') and tolower(AccountName) contains tolower(split('{UserUPN}', '@')[0]))
    or (isnotempty('{DeviceName}') and tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}'))
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, LogonType, ActionType, RemoteIP, RemoteDeviceName, IsLocalAdmin
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Device logon events

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Process execution on device

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}')
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize ConnectionCount = count() by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by ConnectionCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Network connections from device
Unified event timeline — alerts, sign-ins, and device logons
